name: Seasonal Sale
description: 28-day urgency-driven campaign arc for time-limited sales events, holiday promotions, and clearance pushes.

phases.name: teaser
phases.label: Teaser & Anticipation
phases.goal: Hint at the upcoming sale without revealing specifics. Build email list and retargeting audiences. Create FOMO before details drop.

spokeCadence.blogPosts: 1 gift guide or seasonal trend piece
spokeCadence.influencerTouchpoints: Seed product boxes to 3-5 creators with NDA

themeBank: Sneak Peek: What's in the Box?

phases.name: buildup
phases.label: Buildup & Hype
phases.goal: Reveal sale details progressively. Drive VIP/early-access sign-ups. Warm up all channels for launch day.

spokeCadence.paidAds: Retarget site visitors, push email sign-ups

themeBank: The Big Reveal: Here's What's On Sale

phases.name: launch
phases.label: Sale Live
phases.goal: Maximum conversion pressure. Daily urgency beats. Highlight bestsellers, low stock, and top picks.

spokeCadence.emailBlasts: 3 total (day 15 launch, day 18 bestsellers, day 20 reminder)
spokeCadence.blogPosts: None — all energy on social and email
spokeCadence.paidAds: Conversion-optimized, dynamic product ads, full budget
spokeCadence.influencerTouchpoints: Coordinated launch day posts, affiliate links live

phases.name: last-chance
phases.label: Last Chance & FOMO
phases.goal: Final push with maximum urgency. Cart abandonment recovery. Extended deal for email subscribers only. Post-sale wind-down.

spokeCadence.emailBlasts: 3 total (day 22 last chance, day 25 cart recovery, day 28 final hours)
spokeCadence.paidAds: Retarget cart abandoners, scale down last 2 days

themeBank: Cart Reminder: You Left Something Behind
